---
title: "Weather Data Pipeline"
date: 2025-09-15
categories: [API, Automation]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/2258536/pexels-photo-2258536.jpeg"
description: An automated pipeline for collecting, storing, and version-controlling meteorological data using Bash and GitHub Actions.
---

![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/2258536/pexels-photo-2258536.jpeg)
*Photo: [Frank Cone](https://www.pexels.com/@frank-cone-140140) - pexels*

## Overview
This project automates the collection of weather data and stores it in a repository.  
It uses **Bash scripting** and **GitHub Actions** to schedule and run the pipeline, ensuring that weather observations are downloaded, timestamped, and saved automatically.

## Tools
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-150458?logo=pandasm),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/API-Integration-blue),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bash-Scripting-4EAA25),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/JSON-000000?logo=json&logoColor=white),
`GitHub Actions`


## More About:
[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/lmacakova/weather_data_pipeline)

---

[Latest commit](../weather_data_pipeline.qmd)
